view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 blocked

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for transactional vs marketing message separation.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding the separation of transactional and marketing messages. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm whether this requirement is satisfied, as it primarily discusses SMS reminders and email fallback without addressing the separation of message types. The lack of concrete evidence regarding the handling of marketing messages in relation to transactional messages leads to an inconclusive verdict.
